narrative:
Braceville Twp Only township has 1,705 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
